title: Access to Information and Personal Information Request Form (IMM 5563) - Canada.ca
content:
## Access to Information and Personal Information Request Form (IMM 5563)
This application includes the following items:
- Access to Information and Personal Information Request IMM 5563 (opens in a new tab) August 2022
(for Access to Information requests only)
Payment can be made by cheque or money order made payable to the Receiver General for Canada .
Note: Your request will not be processed until your application fee is received.
- Download your request form and carefully read the instructions
- Complete, sign and date your request form
- Fill out the Consent for an Access to Information and Personal Information Request form.
- Pay the fees (if applicable)
- Mail your fully completed request forms with the supporting documents to the following address: Access to Information and Privacy Division Citizenship and Immigration Canada Ottawa, Ontario K1A 1L1
Access to Information and Privacy Division Citizenship and Immigration Canada Ottawa, Ontario K1A 1L1
- Make an access to information request
- Make a privacy request
